subject: Re: Main house south elevation and Guest pool first draft
body:
the arches are too delicate,..they should be roman
aqueduct,,, there is no scale... how high are the
arches... the roofs should be hipped in shingle ,, not
french,,, same as rest of house .. no french porthole
in roof... salt wind make them bad.l. lets try to..the
partire should be side by side ,, otherwise you have
to walk in a funny pattern toget to the pool

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

> Jeffrey, take a look at this esquisse of the main
> house section/elevation that does not include your
> and her houses.In addition to that, you can see the
> plan and the elevations of the new building for the
> pool. I am looking forward  to discuss this together
>  any time.Thanks,J.P. 
> 


__________________________________________________
